name: gemini-research-mcp
description: AI-powered research using Gemini: quick grounded search, URL extraction, Deep Research, and Deep Research Max
long_description:
MCP server providing AI-powered research capabilities using Google Gemini:

- **research_web**: Fast web research with Gemini grounding (5-30 seconds)
- **fetch_webpage**: Read and extract clean Markdown from a specific URL
- **research_deep**: Comprehensive autonomous research agent (3-20 minutes)
- **research_deep_max**: Maximum-comprehensiveness Deep Research for exhaustive, high-stakes, due-diligence, market-map, literature-review, and offline workflows
- **research_followup**: Continue conversation with previous deep research sessions
- **resume_research**: Recover interrupted or in-progress research sessions
- **list_research_sessions**: List previous research sessions
- **list_format_templates**: Browse report format templates
- **export_research_session**: Export completed research to Markdown, JSON, or Word (DOCX)

tools.name: research_web
tools.description: Fast web research with Gemini grounding (5-30 seconds). Use for fact-checking, current events, documentation.

tools.name: research_deep
tools.description: Default/fast Deep Research agent (3-20 minutes). Use for interactive research, competitive analysis, comparisons, investigations, and latency/cost-sensitive synthesis.

tools.name: research_deep_max
tools.description: Deep Research Max for maximum completeness. Use when the user says Max, exhaustive, comprehensive, due diligence, market map, literature review, high-stakes, board-ready, offline/nightly, or prioritizes completeness over speed.

tools.name: fetch_webpage
tools.description: Read and extract clean Markdown content from a specific public URL.

tools.name: research_followup
tools.description: Continue conversation with any previous deep research session.

tools.name: resume_research
tools.description: Recover interrupted or in-progress research sessions.

tools.name: list_research_sessions
tools.description: Returns JSON list of previous research sessions with queries and summaries.

tools.name: list_format_templates
tools.description: Browse reusable report format templates for research outputs.

tools.name: export_research_session
tools.description: Export completed research to Markdown, JSON, or Word (DOCX) format.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Your Google Gemini API key (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
